calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pin Pin Chen in Propria Persona.
William Chen (Beneficiary) and Joyce Chen (Beneficiary) also present.

The Court informed Ms. Chen that the matter is on calendar because distribution was made without Court authority and that doing so was very inappropriate. Ms. Chen stated that she did not know and she thought once she had the order, she had authority. The Court stated that it was Ms. Chen's obligation to follow the law, that she was not authorized to make distribution and that she was required to get Court approval prior to doing that. Ms. Chen stated that she used The People's Choice for assistance. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order), but it will not approve the actions of the Administrator. If Ms. Chen has any other questions or she thinks there is anything else to do, the Court suggest that she hire an Attorney.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
